metadata.title: WPA Global Institutions Master List
metadata.description: Full URL Restoration Patch — Revision 1. Dataset methodology unchanged from CORRECTED-4E. Website URL addition does not imply source verification.

groups.A: Protocol & Diplomacy Core (25 records total, including 1 reported cooperation-model observation)
groups.B: Think Tanks & Research Institutes (25 records total, including 1 reported cooperation-model observation)

protocol_relevance_levels.A: Direct protocol/diplomatic training institution (30 records: 28 standard + 2 cooperation-model observations)
protocol_relevance_levels.B: Strategic relevance / think tank / research / affiliated (108 records)
protocol_relevance_levels.D: General reference / minimal direct protocol relevance (0 records)

metadata.verification_status: All 159 external records: Verification pending. Website URL restoration does not equal source verification.
metadata.public_status: Pre-publication candidate / internal review. Not final public benchmark until source and visual verification are completed.
metadata.motto: „Преговарањето е опционално. Протоколот е апсолутен.“ / "Negotiation is optional. Protocol is absolute."
metadata.url_restoration_note: CORRECTED-4F-REV1 restores website URL fields where safely resolvable. Records without safe official URL remain blank. Fixes: protocol_relevance_level consistency, R001 established year, motto typo.

institutions.name: The Protocol School of Washington
institutions.notes: Leading private protocol training institution. Accredited by ACCET.

institutions.name: International School of Protocol and Diplomacy (ISPD)
institutions.notes: Brussels-based. Part of ISPD Group. Executive Master Programme in Protocol & Soft Diplomacy Skills.

institutions.name: Diplomatic School of Spain
institutions.notes: Attached to Spanish Ministry of Foreign Affairs. Paseo Juan XXIII, 5, Madrid.

Protocol School of Washington / INAAR Saudi Arabia
institutions.notes: Methodological observation only. Reported cooperation model between PSOW and INAAR Saudi Arabia. Not verified institutional entity.

institutions.name: National School of Government and International Relations (ENGRI)
institutions.notes: Mexican diplomatic and international relations training.

institutions.name: Foreign Service Institute (FSI)
institutions.notes: U.S. Department of State training arm. Arlington, Virginia.

institutions.name: École Nationale d'Administration (ENA)
institutions.notes: Now INSP (Institut national du service public). Strasbourg.
